MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-11-2001 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2001 Vacated

Minor'S Compromise Hrg. On Calendar In Scd 218 At 9:00 A.M. On Dec. 4, 2001.
Off Calendar Dec-04-2001 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Charlene Mitchell; Reporter: Joyce Long; Clerk: Linda Espy

Appearances: Petitioner Alysa Erculiani with counsel Mark Epstein.

Alysa Erculiania was sworn and examined. The Court approved minor's compromise. The Court signed order in open court. The terms as follows: Carlos Guillen, Jr, a minor, - $17,144.21;Angel Guillen, a minor, $9644.21; Estrella Erculiani, a minor - $13, 394.21 to be deposited in United Airlines Employee Credit Union accounts until minors reach 18 years of age and no withdrawals without a court order. Orders signed in open court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2001 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Approval Of Compromise Of Minor'S Claim-Plaintiff Estrella Erculiani
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Mark Epstein, Esq. 863-5718 for pltfs & moving parties; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court vacates its tentative ruling & transfers the matter to Commissioner Norris (per Commissioner Norris) (not a law & motion matter).
